'''''Polyhedron'' 86''' was a roleplaying magazine from [[August]] [[1993]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including two supplements for [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]. The article were called "[[The New Republic Campaign: Preparing to Move Beyond the Movies]]," written by [[Bill Slavicsek]], and "[[Gadgets Galore: A Bevy of Useful Items for Science Fiction Games]]," written by [[Eric Lazarian]].
